name: Example Legal Tool
description: Template showing how to plug any legal agentic tool into Big Michael. Copy this file, rename it, and fill in your tool's details.

tools.name: example_search
tools.description: Search for legal documents in Example Legal Tool.

agents.name: Example Tool Specialist
agents.description: Specialises in using Example Legal Tool for legal research and document retrieval.
agents.systemPrompt: You are the Example Tool Specialist. Use the example_search tool to find relevant legal materials. Always cite your sources and note the jurisdiction each source covers.

workflows.name: Example Research Workflow
workflows.description: End-to-end legal research using Example Legal Tool.
